creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=f6c8ed2227773214e4e303e704bf1e6eb8bebe9f

commit f6c8ed2227773214e4e303e704bf1e6eb8bebe9f
Author:     Matthew Seaman <matthew@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-03-15 11:07:04 +0000
Commit:     Matthew Seaman <matthew@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-03-15 11:10:59 +0000

    devel/py-setuptools_scm_git_archive: update to 1.4

    There's no upstream changelog, and this package is documented as
    obsolete with setuptools_scm >= 7.0.0 However, ports only has
    setuptools_scm = 6.4.2 at the moment.

    PR:             270137
    Approved by:    Ting-Wei Lan (maintainer)

 devel/py-setuptools_scm_git_archive/Makefile | 2 +-
 devel/py-setuptools_scm_git_archive/distinfo | 6 +++---
 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)
